_meta: E-B2 i18n string table. Keys are stable ids; values are the EN copy (1930s pulp voice — do NOT plain-language these). To translate: add data/strings.<lang>.json with the same keys. The app falls back to EN for any missing key. This is the FOUNDATION slice: a handful of high-visibility strings are wired through t(); the full ~200-string migration is mechanical follow-on (E-B2b).
landing.cta.sub: No account · photos stay on your device
